info.title: Amplify Platform API v1.0.0
info.description: The Amplify Platform API provides the interface to perform the following: - Manage account settings and credentials - Manage organization settings, users, service accounts, and teams - Retrieve organization usage data - Register and manage applications - Retrieve application metrics and analytics - Retrieve user, organization, and application activity See the Amplify Guide for documentation and examples on how to authorize API calls to platform services. For general documentation refer to the Amplify Platform documentation. © Axway 2026. All rights reserved.
